授業目的: The purpose of this course is to improve students' ability to read, analyze, comprehend, discuss, and respond to authentic English articles on a variety of topics.
到達目標: Students will be able to:1. Read authentic articles on topics related to language, culture, and society2. Analyze written texts from a variety of genres and react to them critically3. Write a 1000 word research article on a topic in introduced in class4. Give an 8-minute multimedia presentation based on the content of your article5. Lead small group discussions on research articles found outside of class
授業方法: Classes are conducted face-to-face in the classroom.

第27回: 【Flex Hours】Online class (On-demand format and/or Task-oriented format)《90minutes》
第28回: 【Flex Hours】Online class (On-demand format and/or Task-oriented format)《90minutes》
第29回: 【Classes and Examination Period】Feedback & Wrap-up(Face-to-face class)《90minutes 》
第30回: 【Classes and Examination Period】Final Examination (Face-to-face class)《90minutes》
トピック.授業計画1:
Lessons held in the computer lab will be focused on research and writing for the final essay and presentation. Lessons held in normal classrooms will be for lectures, group discussions, and textbook activities.
Skills that will be highlighted in this course:
synthesizing information; quoting, paraphrasing, and summarizing, supporting opinions with facts and statistics, critical thinking, research skills, basic APA citation format, avoiding plagiarism, gathering data through field research
トピック.授業外学習2: Students must be highly motivated to succeed in this course. The will need to research, read, and prepare discussions for authentic English texts outside of class. Students must also work on their own research papers for homework.

学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する以下の能力が養成されます。
言語教育科目：１．言語コミュニケーション能力：外国語力を生かし、積極的に発信できる。２．異文化理解・多文化共生力：異文化に対する感受性をもち、多様な文化と共生できる。
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading1: Writing assignments (50%), Presentation (20%), Assignment (20%), Speaking Test (10%)
